name: Camp Occupancy Summary
query:
SELECT
    name as "Camp:Link/Camp Master:150",
    camp_name as "Camp Name::150",
    total_capacity as "Capacity:Int:100",
    occupied_beds as "Occupied:Int:100",
    vacant_beds as "Vacant Beds:Int:100",
    occupancy_percent as "Occupancy Percent:Percent:100"
FROM `tabCamp Master`
WHERE is_active = 1
